originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&flags` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= CROSS_COMPILE false) (= WIN32 true) (= NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES false))
model:
(define-fun WIN32 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CROSS_COMPILE () Bool
  false)
reasoning: PC is infeasible: CROSS_COMPILE=F means the '#else' block at L8-13 executes. With WIN32=T, '#if defined(WIN32) || defined(OS2)' at L10 is true, so NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES is internally defined at L11. Yet PC requires NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES=F — contradiction. This configuration cannot exist. Classification: FALSE.
